active_research_projects.title: Fake News Identification using Fine-Tuned LLMs, RAG Agents, and Neuro-Symbolic AI
active_research_projects.objective: Analyze news and social media data to identify fake news with high accuracy by leveraging LLMs, agents, tools, and neuro-symbolic AI.

active_research_projects.title: Social Media Sentiment Analysis using Fine-Tuned LLMs, RAG Agents, and Neuro-Symbolic AI
active_research_projects.objective: Compute sentiment scores and classify social media posts into sentiment categories using fine-tuned LLMs, RAG agents, tools, and neuro-symbolic AI.

active_research_projects.title: Understanding Adolescent Obesity from Social Media Data using LLMs
active_research_projects.objective: Analyze social media data to understand adolescent obesity and healthy diet trends to support healthcare provider guidance.
publications: Cross-Platform Sentiment Intelligence for Adolescent Health (Under Review)

active_research_projects.title: Accurate Hospital Patient Message Classification using Fine-Tuned LLMs
active_research_projects.objective: Automate classification of large volumes of hospital patient messages using fine-tuned LLMs to improve response efficiency.

active_research_projects.title: Studying V2X Communication for Improved Safety and Traffic Modeling
active_research_projects.objective: Investigate Vehicle-to-Everything (V2X) communication to enhance road safety and traffic conditions.
